channel.title: Payments on Japan Profiler
channel.description: Recent content in Payments on Japan Profiler

item.title: Mastering Cashless Payments in Japan: A Foreigner's Guide to PayPay, Suica & More (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to cashless payments in Japan for foreigners in 2026. Compare PayPay, Suica, credit cards, and mobile wallets with setup instructions and troubleshooting.
